reasoning: I want to test the relationship between voltage, current, and resistance. I'll increase the current to see how it affects the voltage.
I've observed that increasing the current increases the voltage proportionally. I'll now decrease the current to see if the voltage decreases accordingly.
I have observed that increasing current increases voltage and decreasing current decreases voltage. I will now try to change the resistance to see how it affects the voltage.
I've observed that increasing the current increases the voltage and increasing the resistance increases the voltage. I will now decrease the resistance to see how it affects the voltage.
I've observed that voltage is directly proportional to current and inversely proportional to resistance. I will now perform a more rigorous experiment to confirm this relationship.
I have collected enough data to establish the relationship between voltage, current, and resistance. Voltage is directly proportional to current and inversely proportional to resistance.
